title: Fix login page redirect loop
description:
When a user tries to log in with SSO, they get stuck in a redirect loop.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to /login
2. Click 'Sign in with SSO'
3. Get redirected back to /login repeatedly

## Expected behavior

User should be redirected to the dashboard after SSO authentication.
author: pm_user

notes.author: asmith
notes.body: I can reproduce this consistently with Chrome and Firefox. The issue seems to be in the OAuth callback handler.

notes.author: jdoe
notes.body: Traced it to the session cookie not being set correctly when SameSite=Strict is used.

merge_requests.title: Fix SSO redirect by setting SameSite=Lax
